dosage: 1000 mcg IM daily for 1 week, then weekly for 1 month, then monthly

dosage: 200 mg (65 mg elemental iron) two to three times daily

dosage: 2 g IV once daily for 7–10 days

dosage: 2.5–10 mg once daily
